layout.cardStyle: Tactical Minimalism. 1px solid stroke (border) rather than soft shadows. High-saturation accent blocks for progress bars and primary actions.

components.heroStats: Bento Grid layout. 1 dominant stat card (e.g., Total Workouts), smaller cards for Streaks and Today's Volume. Uses primary color accents.
components.muscleGroupCard: Dark overlay gradient on background image, bottom-left aligned bold text, 1px border. Tap to enter category.
components.bottomSheet: Used for logging sets/reps. Slides up smoothly with react-native-reanimated. Blurs background.
components.buttons: Sharp edges (md border-radius), high contrast. Primary actions are solid #FF3B30 with white text.
components.charts: Line charts for Max Weight, Bar charts for Volume. Use victory-native or react-native-chart-kit. Chart line should be #FF3B30 with a gradient fill below.
components.inputs: Dark surface background with 1px border. Focus state turns border to #FF3B30.

iconography.style: Sharp, clear, and unadorned. (e.g., barbell-outline, body-outline, stats-chart)

animations.transitions: React Navigation native stack default animations + custom reanimated shared element transitions if possible.
animations.microInteractions: Tap scale down (0.95) on cards and buttons. Smooth count-up animations for numbers (stats).

screens.home: Features the hero stats bento grid at the top, followed by a 2-column grid of the 6 muscle group cards. Each card uses the respective category image with a dark gradient overlay and bottom-left bold title.
screens.categoryDetail: A list view of up to 10 exercises. Shows exercise name and a small subtitle indicating 'Last logged: X days ago' or 'No logs yet'. Has a floating action button (FAB) to add a custom exercise.
screens.exerciseDetail: A scrollable page. Top section: Input form for today's workout (Set number, Reps, Weight). Middle section: Recent history list. Bottom section: Progress charts toggleable between Max Weight and Total Volume. Needs kg/lbs unit reflection based on settings.
screens.settings: Simple screen with toggle for Weight Unit (kg/lbs) and option to clear all local data. Includes Dark Theme UI details.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use React Native (Expo) and standard React Native elements (View, Text, StyleSheet) or styled-components/NativeWind. No web-specific UI components (like shadcn/ui).
Implement navigation using react-navigation/native and native-stack.
Use react-native-reanimated for gesture-driven features (e.g. swipe to delete set, bottom sheets).
For local storage, use @react-native-async-storage/async-storage for storing workouts, sets, and user settings without login.
Ensure all interactive elements have a `testID` attribute for automated testing.
Implement the UI with tactical minimalism: use pure #0A0A0A background, 1px #27272A borders, and #FF3B30 as the primary energetic accent. Avoid heavy box shadows; rely on borders for definition.
For cards with background images, apply a dark overlay (e.g., backgroundColor: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.5)') to ensure white text is strictly legible (APCA contrast).
Seed the app with the 6 categories (Shoulders, Legs, Chest, Arms, Back, Abs) and up to 10 standard exercises each on first launch if storage is empty.
